_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Skill in designing data classification frameworks and implementing classification controls that enforce handling, access, and retention requirements based on data sensitivity and regulatory classification.
comments: NICE knowledge intersects with WIDAI SP domain. Skill SP-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-K-005 (SP, cosine: 0.540), DQ-K-011 (DQ, cosine: 0.526).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.3/10 (raw 0.535). Shared vocabulary: [classification, data]. NICE-only terms [knowledge, levels] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, based, controls, designing, enforce, frameworks] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.895, R=0.859). P exceeds R by 0.036 — the NICE element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of data classification levels" and "Skill in designing data classification frameworks and implementing classificatio" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.573 ≈ STS 0.535 (gap 0.038). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [classification, data] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [classification, data]. NICE-only: [knowledge, levels]. WIDAI-only: [access, based, controls, designing, enforce, frameworks].

signals.detail: STS 0.535 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
